query:
ALTER TABLE partnerEarnings 
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pending', 'credited', 'paid_out', 'voided') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  ADD COLUMN voidedAt DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN voidedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN voidReason TEXT NULL;
